questions.question: How should I fix the invalid "mcp__*" allow rule?

options.label: Just remove mcp__*
options.description: Delete the invalid line only. Clears the doctor warning; everything else unchanged. MCP tools still prompt for permission as before.

options.label: Remove + fix pencil
options.description: Delete mcp__* and change mcp__pencil to mcp__pencil__* so the whole pencil server is allowed without prompts.

options.label: Remove + allow all servers
options.description: Delete mcp__* and add mcp__<server>__* for each configured server (pencil, cloudflare, etc.) to auto-allow all their tools.

options.description: Gemini CLI(請告訴我啟動指令)

options.label: 可改題色 + 可透明
options.description: 設定裡選背景色,並可開啟視窗透明(毛玻璃/vibrancy)。較完整,工較多
